name: MTN MoMo
description: MTN MoMo — MTN's mobile money platform covering 16 African countries with collection, disbursement, and remittance APIs.

seo.title: MTN MoMo — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: MTN MoMo: MTN MoMo — MTN's mobile money platform covering 16 African countries with collection, disbursement, and remittance APIs.

when_to_use: Collecting payments via mobile money across 16 African countries
Disbursing salaries or gig payouts to MTN wallets
Remittance corridors into MTN MoMo accounts
Bill payment collection via USSD for unbanked users

pros: Collection, disbursement, remittance in one API
review.verdict: Essential for merchants serving African mobile money users — accept the operational overhead for the reach.
review.best_for: Businesses collecting or disbursing across MTN's African footprint
review.not_for: Teams wanting a plug-and-play gateway outside Africa

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Usage/metered billing, scales up and down
